message:
✨ Add issue title to workflow run name

- Add optional issue_title input for workflow_dispatch
- Show title in run name from either input or event context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,8 +9,12 @@ on:
         description: 'Issue number to fix'
         required: true
         type: number
+      issue_title:
+        description: 'Issue title (optional, for display)'
+        required: false
+        type: string
 
-run-name: "AI Fix #${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || github.event.issue.number }}"
+run-name: "AI Fix #${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || github.event.issue.number }}: ${{ github.event.inputs.issue_title || github.event.issue.title || 'Processing...' }}"
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
